title: G-Lottery
description: A plugin desinged to add a lottery to your server. A perfect addition to your economy !
body:
# G-Lottery

[![Modrinth Downloads](https://img.shields.io/modrinth/dt/g-lottery)](https://modrinth.com/plugin/g-lottery)  ![Supported Version](https://img.shields.io/modrinth/v/nzw6wMpS)

![Avaiable for Purpur](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b9cf7c6e7643f701bd5f089192355147d34da352_0.webp) ![Available for Spigot](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/510c40fca2d3eeb74691e3fbb05454be4442907d.png) ![Available for Paper](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b616c4f5d5e3c292df2aa3954e5b5231719e5d12_0.webp)
## Description

G-Lottery is a feature-rich lottery system for Minecraft Java servers. Players can purchase tickets using various currencies, and periodic raffles distribute the accumulated pot to lucky winners. With support for offline players and multiple currency types.

## Features

- **Ticket System**: Players buy tickets to enter raffles
- **PlaceholderAPI support**
- **Multiple Currencies**: Support for Vault economy and item-based currencies
- **Offline Support**: Claim rewards even if offline during raffle
- **Statistics**: Track winners, pot amounts, and player tickets
- **Highly Configurable**: Customize prices, intervals, and messages
- **Admin Controls**: Automatic raffles, pot management, and settings
- **Automatic** winner anoucement

## Installation

<details>
<summary>Details</summary>

    
1. Download G-Lottery.jar from the releases
   
2. Place in your `plugins/` folder
   
3. Restart your server
   
4. Configure in `plugins/G-Lottery/config.yml`

</details>



## Commands


<details>
<summary>Details</summary>

### Player Commands
- `/lottery buy <amount>` - Buy lottery tickets

- `/lottery leaderboard` - View the leadeboard
  
- `/lottery claim` - Claim unclaimed rewards
  
- `/lottery status` - Check pot, next draw, your tickets

- `/lottery help` - Provide the list of commands players can use

### Admin Commands

- `/lottery raffle` - Trigger manual raffle
  
- `/reload` - Reload G-Lottery config

- `/lottery tech-support` - Provide useful info to help you with you issues on Discord
  
- `/lottery donate <amount> <private | public >` - Add to pot

- `/lottery status` (as Operator) - Check pot, next draw, your tickets and more


## Configuration

Edit `config.yml` and `messages.yaml` to customize:

- Ticket prices and raffle intervals
  
- Currency type (Vault or items)
  
- Message templates
  
- Maximum stored draws for claims

</details>



## Dependencies

- **[Vault](https://modrinth.com/plugin/vaultunlocked)** (Optional)
  
- **[PlaceholderAPI]([https://modrinth.com/plugin/placeholderapi])** (Optional)
  
- **An economy plugin** (Like [EssentialX](https://essentialsx.net/)) (Optional)
